meaning: n.技艺,功绩,武艺,壮举,技艺表演adj.漂亮的,合适的
examples: Man's first landing on the moon was a feat of great daring.
The tower is being celebrated as a grand feat on the world stage.
Though no great technical feat, the procedure opens a range of unsettling possibilities.
That's no small feat, given the consistent underperformance of actively managed funds in general.
"Goodbaby has entered the retail market, and this isn't an easy feat, " says Song.
